general.name: mangagalaxyzoo
general.short: This table contains the Galaxy Zoo classifications for all MaNGA target galaxies.
general.description: This table contains the Galaxy Zoo classifications for all MaNGA target galaxies.

surveys.name: MaNGA
surveys.long: Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory
surveys.description: A wide-field optical spectroscopic IFU survey of extragalactic sources to study galaxy dynamics and kinematics

general.naming_convention: $MANGA_MORPHOLOGY/galaxyzoo/MaNGA_gz-[VER].fits where VER=v1_0_1 in DR15 and VER=v2_0_1 in DR17.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.name: PRIMARY
hdu0.description:
TheGalaxy Zoo(GZ) data for SDSS galaxies has been split over several iterations of the website, with the MaNGA
  target galaxies being spread over 5 different GZ data sets. In this VAC we bring all of these galaxies into one
  single catalog with the debiasing code run in a consistent manner across the all the galaxies. This
  catalog includes previously published data from Galaxy Zoo 2 (Willett 2013)
  and newer data from Galaxy Zoo 4 and 5 (previously unpublished).

  catalog includes previously published data from Galaxy Zoo 2 (Willett 2013)
  and newer data from Galaxy Zoo 4 and 5 (previously unpublished).
